entries.title: CAEDEROL (Can)
entries.description: Predio en la isla de Mallorca, prov. de Baleares, part. jud. de Inca, térm. y jurisd. de la v. de Pollensa.
entries.note: OCR reads 'CAEDEROÜ' — uncertain transliteration; preserved as CAEDEROL pending confirmation.
